Resolves #15283

Refs #13015

The W2 census's boot seam closed: `npm run cockpit` is now the ONE command that lands an operator on a LIVE Fleet-Manager cockpit. The census (on the epic) established the inversion this leaf completes — the seed→live wiring had shipped end-to-end (`app.mjs` installs the bridge unconditionally; the routing matrices are spec-pinned; controls are product-wired), and the entire lived 'FM is not functional' experience was one unsupervised process: `devFleetServer` only started via a separate manual command nobody's boot ran.

**What ships:** `buildScripts/devCockpit.mjs` — a supervising launcher, not a service (the fleet server stays a Brain entry under `ai/`; `server-start` is byte-untouched):

- **Port-honest first** (the shared-machine reality): the fleet port is probed before anything spawns — a busy :8083 means another checkout or a prior run owns the transport, so the launcher REUSES it with a named log line, never a silent second server fighting the socket. `NEO_FLEET_PORT` passes through (default 8083, matching `installFleetBridge`).
- **Supervision:** spawns `devFleetServer` + `npm run server-start` with inherited stdio; SIGINT/SIGTERM forward to every spawned child; a webpack exit tears the session down; a fleet-server exit logs the loss loudly (with the restart command) while the cockpit degrades to its honest offline states — fail-closed stays intact, and the operable-cold banner sibling (#15284) will name it on the surface.
- **Witness seam:** `planCockpitBoot` / `probePort` are exported pure so the boot plan is unit-pinned.

Evidence: L2 (the pure decision matrix + a probe witness against a real ephemeral loopback listener) → L2 required (the boot-plan ACs). Residual: the full two-process spawn journey (launcher → webpack + fleet server → cockpit paints live) is a heavyweight cross-process e2e — carried in Post-Merge Validation; the spawn targets each carry their own suites.

## Deltas from ticket

One AC delta, carried honestly: the ticket asked for a `learn/` run-the-cockpit line — no run-the-cockpit page EXISTS to amend, and authoring a new guide page carries the full guide bar (its own doc-lane leaf, out of this leaf's grain). The command is documented at its two native surfaces (the launcher's module JSDoc + `package.json`); the guide-page gap is flagged for the W1 doc slice rather than silently dropped.

## Test Evidence

- `CI=1 npm run test-unit -- test/playwright/unit/ai/buildScripts/devCockpit.spec.mjs` → **3/3** (exit-checked): the spawn-vs-reuse plan matrix (free port → spawn + named note; busy port → reuse + never-a-second-server note) and `probePort` against a REAL ephemeral listener (busy while listening, free after close).
- Live smoke on this checkout: probe :8083 → free → plan says spawn (the machine truth).
- buildScripts surface: existing check-* suites unaffected (no shared code touched).

## Post-Merge Validation

- [ ] Full boot journey on a fresh checkout: `npm run cockpit` → cockpit paints with `live` adapter states, zero manual server starts (the §04 PoC pre-condition).
- [ ] Shared-machine pass: second checkout runs `npm run cockpit` while the first serves :8083 → reuse note appears, no socket fight.

## Commits

- the single commit — launcher + witnesses + the `cockpit` npm script
